# Python instructions
Use snake_case for variable and function names.
Use CamelCase for class names.
Follow PEP 8 style guidelines.
Include type hints for function parameters and return types.
Write docstrings for all public modules, classes, functions, and methods.

# Use of git
The following instructions are for GitHub Copilot Chat. They help guide the behavior of the AI assistant when it is providing code suggestions or explanations. Please follow these instructions carefully to ensure the best possible experience.
Never suggest or run git commands, both 'git commit', 'git push', etc. The user will allways type them manually, or ask specifically for help with them.
